description.ko: 에메랄드빛 막과 세포벽을 통해 흐르는 황금빛 수액, 그리고 진주빛 유체 속의 생명력을 표현한 유기적 네트워크.
description.en: A living network of emerald membranes and golden sap flowing through translucent cells in a pearlescent void.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Mitochondrial Lattice.' A pulsating network of #7FB069 emerald moss-membranes and #2D5A3D dark forest-green vascular filaments intertwined like living lace. The structure floats in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent fluid. Swirling #FFE66D golden bioluminescent sap flows through semi-permeable cellular walls with rhythmic vitality. Macro cinematography focus on the translucent textures and microscopic capillary dynamics. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid simulations, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution, serene organic life.
